message:
fix: preserve spaces in embedded Dolt paths

The buildDSN function used url.URL.String() to construct the DSN, which
percent-encodes the path component (spaces become %20). The embedded Dolt
driver ParseDataSource uses the path as a literal filesystem string, so
the encoded path fails os.Stat checks.

Build the DSN string directly to avoid URL encoding of filesystem paths.

Fixes #2920

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
